s3_skills: Account for pagination when counting rows in data grid

Aggregate values across data grid rows before selecting maximum
Disambiguate similarly-named entities in autocomplete dropdown
Distinguish between similarly-named record types in navigation menus
Distinguish entity subtypes via dedicated navigation tabs
Exhaustively paginate list before identifying extremum record
Extract complete structured value from multi-component display field
Resolve truncated text in data grid cells before using value
